concepts.name: Event
concepts.short_definition: A specific result or set of results from a random process.

concepts.name: Sample Space
concepts.short_definition: The set of all possible outcomes of a random experiment.

concepts.name: Probability
concepts.short_definition: A measure of how likely an event is to occur, expressed as a number between 0 and 1.

concepts.name: Certain Event
concepts.short_definition: An event that is sure to happen, with a probability of 1.

concepts.name: Impossible Event
concepts.short_definition: An event that cannot happen, with a probability of 0.

concepts.name: Simple Event
concepts.short_definition: An event that consists of only one outcome from the sample space.

concepts.name: Compound Event
concepts.short_definition: An event that consists of two or more simple events.

concepts.name: Mutually Exclusive Events
concepts.short_definition: Events that cannot occur at the same time.

concepts.name: Independent Events
concepts.short_definition: Events where the outcome of one does not affect the outcome of the other.

concepts.name: Complementary Events
concepts.short_definition: Two events that are mutually exclusive and whose probabilities add up to 1.
